about.title: About
about.what_desc: A community preset gallery for Claude Code statusbar tools (ccstatusline, etc.). Pick a style and install it in one line.
about.contribute_desc: Submit a JSON file as a PR and it will appear in the gallery. CI auto-generates screenshots.
